bench_setup.notes: IWDG watchdog test. No wiring required. Phase 1: kicks watchdog 20 times at 50 ms intervals (~1 s), writes PASS, then stops kicking. Phase 2 (after IWDG reset ~100 ms later): detects RCC_CSR.IWDGRSTF, writes PASS with detail0=0xDEAD. settle_s=8 to cover both phases. PASS condition: detail0=0xDEAD confirms IWDG reset was detected.
